chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 86 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 15.10.2024 Mr. Illahi Bux Jamali, Advocate for the Appellant >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the appellant under instructions does not press the instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI
